description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Crowd Management at Kai Tak and Sung Wong Toi stations
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 啟德及宋皇臺站客流管理

2025-02-16T10:03:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that Due to an event at Kai Tak Sports Park, crowd management measures will be in place in Kai Tak and Sung Wong Toi stations today (16 February). One-way passenger flow will be implemented at specific entrances and exits. After the event, there may be additional waiting time to enter the station as passengers will enter in groups.
2025-02-16T10:03:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知， 為配合啟德體育園活動，啟德及宋皇臺站今日（2月16日）將實施客流管理措施，個別出入口會作單向進出安排。 活動散場時，乘客或需於站外等候分批進入車站。

description.LOCATION_EN: Busy Traffic at Hong Kong International Airport
description.LOCATION_CN: 香港國際機場交通繁忙

2025-02-17T07:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to heavy traffic at the road section leading from Airport Road to Hong Kong International Airport’s Terminal 1 Departures Kerb, motorists are advised to use the drop-off area at the Airport’s Car Park 1. Members of the public heading to the Airport are advised to allow sufficient time for their journey and consider taking the Airport Express and buses.
2025-02-17T07:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 現時機場路通往香港國際機場一號客運大樓離港層落客區的路段交通繁忙，駕駛人士請考慮改用機場一號停車場落客區。 前往機場的市民，請預留足夠交通時間，並考慮乘搭機場快綫或巴士。
